title: ARP Common Definitions
description: Shared definitions used across ARP v0.1 schemas. Referenced via $ref from receipt, action, evidence, jurisdiction, and accessibility.

didKey.description: did:key identifier as defined in W3C did:key method (multibase base58btc over multicodec 0xed01 || Ed25519 pubkey32). The leading 'z' indicates base58btc encoding.

rfc3339UtcTimestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp, second precision, UTC, terminated with 'Z'.

rfc3339Timestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp with optional fractional seconds and any timezone offset (used inside machine_payload, etc.).

base64Ed25519Signature.description: Base64-encoded 64-byte Ed25519 signature with padding (88 chars total including '==' padding).

sha256Hash.description: SHA-256 hash with the 'sha256:' prefix and lowercase hex digest.

iso3166Code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, optionally followed by '-' and an ISO 3166-2 subdivision code.

bcp47LanguageTag.description: BCP 47 language tag (loose form — full grammar is too restrictive for JSON Schema regex; pragmatic pattern matches common cases like 'en', 'en-US', 'zh-Hant-TW').

cents.description: Integer amount in the smallest currency unit. Negative = outgoing from the principal's perspective.

extensionsObject.description: Forward-compatible additions. Keys MUST be namespace-prefixed (<domain>.<field>).
